Ripple to unlock 1 billion XRP on August 1; Incoming sell-off?
articles.description: Ripple is set to unlock 1 billion XRP tokens from its escrow account on August 1, 2025, as part of its monthly release schedule. The August release is expected to follow the usual pattern: unlocking 1 billion XRP, returning most to escrow, and using the remainder for operational and market needs. Ripple’s escrow system, launched in 2017, ensures a predictable and transparent XRP supply by unlocking 1 billion XRP each month over a 55-month cycle.
